zh.Lea by Nantwich, Cheshire, England, Unit: 英國英格蘭爾麗婭 白 南特維其
zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine Calveley於1472年出生在英國爾麗婭 白 南特維其時，她的父親Sir George Calveley16歲，母親Elizabeth Dutton15歲。她於1495年與John Beeston在英國英格蘭爾武特金頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1503年9月12日在英國英格蘭爾貝斯頓享年31歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine Calveley于1472年出生在英国爾麗婭 白 南特維其时，她的父亲Sir George Calveley16岁，母亲Elizabeth Dutton15岁。她于1495年与John Beeston在英国英格兰爾武特金頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1503年9月12日在英国英格兰爾貝斯頓享年31岁。

nameMeanings.name: Calveley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Calverley
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): habitational name from Calverley in Yorkshire, named with Old English calfra (genitive plural of calf ‘calf’) + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Alternatively, in some instances the name may be a variant of the habitational name Calveley, from a place so called in Cheshire (with the same meaning as above), or from Calverleigh in Devon, meaning ‘the clearing of the bare wood’ (Old English calu ‘bare, bald’ + wudu ‘wood’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’).

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

variants.name: Christopher
meanings: From the Greek name Khristophoros, from Khristos ‘Christ’ + pherein ‘to bear’. This was popular among early Christians, conscious of the fact that they were metaphorically bearing Christ in their hearts. A later, over-literal interpretation of the name gave rise to the legend of a saint who actually bore the Christ-child over a stream; he is regarded as the patron of travellers. In England the name was uncommon in the Middle Ages, but became very popular in the 16th century, especially in parts of the North.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine Calveley was born in 1472, in Lea by Nantwich, Cheshire, England, her father, Sir George Calveley, was 16 and her mother, Elizabeth Dutton, was 15. She married John Beeston in 1495, in Utkinton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 12 September 1503, in Beeston, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 31.

Elle a épousé John Beeston en 1495, à Utkinton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 12 septembre 1503, à Beeston, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 31 ans.

de.Lea by Nantwich, Cheshire, England, Unit: Lea by Nantwich, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom

ko.Lea by Nantwich, Cheshire, England, Unit: 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 리아 비 난트위치
ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Calveley(이)가 1472년 영국 체실르 리아 비 난트위치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir George Calveley(은)는 16세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Dutton(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1495년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 우트킨턴에서 John Beeston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1503년 9월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 브이스턴에서 31세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com John Beeston em 1495, em Utkinton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.Lea by Nantwich, Cheshire, England, Unit: леа би нантвич, чешир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine Calveley родилась в 1472 г. в местности леа би нантвич, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir George Calveley было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Dutton, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Beeston в 1495 г. в местности уткинтон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 12 сентября 1503 г. в местности бистон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 31 год.
